description_long: This object is a wooden filing cabinet with a rectangular, slightly tapered profile and a natural oak finish. The front face features a colorful, cartoon-style illustration framed by the wood, suggesting it may be a decorative or custom piece. The sides are flat and show the thickness of the wood panels, with no visible handles, drawers, or hardware. The back is plain, displaying the wood grain pattern without any openings or features. The cabinet appears to be solid and relatively thin, likely designed for wall-mounting or as a decorative storage unit. Its construction suggests it is lightweight and intended for indoor use, possibly in an office or home setting.
description: A wooden filing cabinet with a natural oak finish and a colorful framed illustration on the front, featuring a slim, rectangular profile and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain wooden surface with a natural oak grain pattern and no visible features.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the cabinet's slim profile and the thickness of the wood panels.
description_view_2: The front view displays a vibrant, cartoon-style illustration framed by the wood, with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim, flat edge of the cabinet.
